title: Add DELETE with ALLOW FILTERING (mapreduce-style distributed delete)
summary: Adds distributed DELETE with ALLOW FILTERING, dispatching predicate-based deletes across all shards via the mapreduce service with tiered tombstone optimization.

mapreduce_service.summary: Gains a parallel filtering delete pipeline with vnode and tablet routing, per-shard scanning, and tiered tombstone generation.

query_processor.summary: Adds a dispatch entry point bridging filtering delete statements to the mapreduce execution layer.

messaging_service.summary: Registers a new RPC verb for carrying filtering delete requests between nodes.

feature_service.summary: Adds a cluster feature flag gating filtering delete during rolling upgrades.

query_processor->mapreduce_service.summary: Delegates filtering delete requests for parallel cluster-wide execution.

mapreduce_service->messaging_service.summary: Dispatches filtering delete requests to remote nodes via a dedicated RPC verb.

mapreduce_service->query_processor.summary: Re-parses the serialized WHERE clause to reconstruct filtering restrictions on each shard.

filtering_delete_statement.summary: New statement type for DELETE with ALLOW FILTERING that classifies predicates into optimization tiers and dispatches distributed execution.

delete_statement.summary: Refactored to detect ALLOW FILTERING during preparation and route to the new filtering delete statement.

modification_statement.summary: Relaxes WHERE clause validation when allow_filtering is enabled to permit arbitrary predicates.

raw_delete_statement.summary: Adds the allow_filtering flag to the parser representation for routing during preparation.

raw_modification_statement.summary: Adjusts field visibility so derived classes can inspect condition-related state during preparation.

statement_restrictions.summary: Exposes the full WHERE clause expression tree for serialization by the filtering delete.

query_processor.summary: Adds a filtering delete dispatch method and metrics counter bridging to the mapreduce layer.

cql_stats.summary: New counter tracking the number of filtered delete operations.

mapreduce_service.summary: Gains distributed delete execution with vnode/tablet routing, per-shard scanning, and tiered tombstone writing.

filtering_delete_retrying_dispatcher.summary: New helper dispatching delete requests to nodes with automatic local fallback on failure.

filtering_delete_tablet_algorithm.summary: New tablet-aware dispatch splitting ranges across replicas with topology change resilience.

filtering_delete_request.summary: New request structure carrying table identity, serialized WHERE clause, partition ranges, and optimization tier.

filtering_delete_result.summary: New result structure carrying the count of rows deleted across shards.

messaging_service.summary: Adds a new RPC verb for filtering delete requests between cluster nodes.

feature_service.summary: New cluster feature flag gating filtering delete during rolling upgrades.

data_value.summary: Fixes quote escaping and blob hex prefixes in literal formatting for round-trip CQL serialization.

expression.summary: Adds bind variable inlining and fixes quote escaping for correct round-trip expression serialization.

filtering_delete_statement->query_proces.summary: Delegates distributed execution to the query processor.

filtering_delete_statement->statement_re.summary: Reads restrictions to classify the predicate tier and extract the WHERE clause.

filtering_delete_statement->expression.summary: Inlines bind variables into the WHERE clause before remote serialization.

filtering_delete_statement->feature_serv.summary: Checks the cluster feature flag before execution.

filtering_delete_statement->filtering_de.summary: Constructs the request structure for distributed execution.

delete_statement->filtering_delete_state.summary: Routes to the filtering delete statement when ALLOW FILTERING is present.

delete_statement->modification_statement.summary: Delegates WHERE clause processing with the allow_filtering flag.

query_processor->mapreduce_service.summary: Forwards filtering delete requests for parallel cluster-wide execution.

mapreduce_service->messaging_service.summary: Sends filtering delete requests to remote nodes via the new RPC verb.

filtering_delete_retrying_dispatcher->ma.summary: Falls back to local shard dispatch when remote communication fails.

filtering_delete_tablet_algorithm->filte.summary: Sends delete requests to individual tablet replicas with fault tolerance.

mapreduce_service->filtering_delete_retr.summary: Creates retry dispatchers to send delete requests to endpoint nodes.

mapreduce_service->filtering_delete_tabl.summary: Delegates to the tablet algorithm when the target table uses tablet storage.

filtering_delete_statement::filtering_de.summary: Initializes the filtering delete statement from base delete state.

filtering_delete_statement::classify.summary: Inspects predicate shape to select the optimal tombstone tier.

filtering_delete_statement::execute_with.summary: Validates the cluster feature flag before delegating to execution.

filtering_delete_statement::do_execute.summary: Inlines bind variables, computes partition ranges, and dispatches the distributed delete request.

delete_statement::prepare_statement.summary: Factored-out preparation that validates and routes ALLOW FILTERING deletes.

delete_statement::prepare_internal.summary: Updated to delegate to the new preparation step and pass the allow_filtering flag.

modification_statement::process_where_cl.summary: Relaxes restriction validation when allow_filtering is enabled.

statement_restrictions::where.summary: Exposes the complete WHERE clause expression tree for serialization.

query_processor::filtering_delete.summary: Forwards filtering delete requests to the mapreduce service.

expression::inline_bind_variables.summary: Replaces bind variable placeholders with concrete values for self-contained serialization.

mapreduce_service::init_messaging_servic.summary: Registers the new filtering delete RPC verb handler.

mapreduce_service::uninit_messaging_serv.summary: Unregisters the filtering delete RPC verb during shutdown.

mapreduce_service::dispatch_delete.summary: Entry point that resolves schema and routes to vnode or tablet dispatch.

mapreduce_service::dispatch_delete_to_sh.summary: Fans out the delete request across local CPU shards and aggregates results.

mapreduce_service::execute_delete_on_thi.summary: Scans local data, evaluates filtering predicates, and writes tombstones at the appropriate tier granularity.

mapreduce_service::dispatch_delete_range.summary: Sends a range-scoped delete to a target node and merges the result.

mapreduce_service::dispatch_delete_to_vn.summary: Splits partition ranges across vnode endpoints and dispatches in parallel.

mapreduce_service::dispatch_delete_to_ta.summary: Delegates to the tablet algorithm for range splitting and replica dispatch.

filtering_delete_retrying_dispatcher::fi.summary: Initializes the retry dispatcher with service reference and trace state.

filtering_delete_retrying_dispatcher::di.summary: Sends a delete request to a node with automatic local fallback on failure.

filtering_delete_tablet_algorithm::filte.summary: Initializes the tablet algorithm with service references and concurrency limit.

filtering_delete_tablet_algorithm::initi.summary: Splits partition ranges into tablet-aligned chunks for dispatch.

filtering_delete_tablet_algorithm::prepa.summary: Maps pending ranges to live, local-DC tablet replicas.

filtering_delete_tablet_algorithm::get_p.summary: Generates per-replica processing slots up to the concurrency limit.

filtering_delete_tablet_algorithm::dispa.summary: Dispatch loop processing all ranges with topology-change resilience.

data_value::to_parsable_string.summary: Fixes quote escaping and blob hex prefixes for valid CQL round-trip parsing.

filtering_delete_statement::do_execute->.summary: Dispatches the request to the query processor for distributed execution.
Inlines bind variable values for self-contained remote serialization.
Determines the optimization tier before constructing the request.

filtering_delete_statement::execute_with.summary: Delegates to execution after feature flag validation.

delete_statement::prepare_internal->dele.summary: Delegates to the factored-out preparation step for statement construction.

delete_statement::prepare_statement->mod.summary: Delegates WHERE clause processing with the allow_filtering flag.

query_processor::filtering_delete->mapre.summary: Forwards the delete request to the mapreduce dispatch entry point.

mapreduce_service::dispatch_delete->mapr.summary: Selects vnode-based routing for non-tablet tables.
Selects tablet-based routing for tablet tables.

mapreduce_service::dispatch_delete_range.summary: Uses the retry dispatcher for fault-tolerant node dispatch.

filtering_delete_retrying_dispatcher::di.summary: Falls back to local shard dispatch on failure.

mapreduce_service::dispatch_delete_to_sh.summary: Fans out execution to all local CPU shards in parallel.

mapreduce_service::dispatch_delete_to_ta.summary: Delegates to the algorithm's dispatch loop after initialization.

filtering_delete_tablet_algorithm::dispa.summary: Dispatches range requests to tablet replicas via the retry dispatcher.
Re-prepares replica mapping each iteration for topology changes.

mapreduce_service::init_messaging_servic.summary: Routes incoming filtering delete RPC requests to local shard dispatch.
